name: Best RCCG Region – Youth Development
description: This award recognises a region that has consistently invested in nurturing, empowering, and equipping young people for spiritual growth, leadership, skill development, and national impact.

fields.label: Do you reside in Redemption City or any RCCG Region?
In less than 200 words, describe how this region has contributed to the spiritual growth of its youth (e.g. Bible Study, discipleship, prayer revival).
In less than 200 words, list or explain youth empowerment programs (e.g. tech training, entrepreneurship, career coaching, educational support).

sections.title: Youth Engagement & Inclusion in Church Activities

fields.label: In less than 200 words, explain how youths are involved in leadership, events, missions, and church projects within the region.
Youth Engagement & Inclusion in Church Activities
In less than 200 words, provide verifiable results or testimonials of how the region's youth ministry has influenced lives, churches, or communities.
